javadoc_before:
/** * Returns a copy of this datetime with the specified date, retaining the time fields. *

* If the date is already the date passed in, then this is returned. *

* To set a single field use the properties, for example: * 

     * DateTime set = monthOfYear().setCopy(6);
     *
*

* This instance is immutable and unaffected by this method call. * * @param year the new year value * @param monthOfYear the new monthOfYear value * @param dayOfMonth the new dayOfMonth value * @return a copy of this datetime with a different date * @throws IllegalArgumentException if any value if invalid */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns a copy of this datetime with the specified date, retaining the time fields. *

* If the date is already the date passed in, then this is returned. *

* To set a single field use the properties, for example: * 

     * DateTime set = monthOfYear().setCopy(6);
     *
*

* If the time is invalid on the new date due to the time-zone, the time will be adjusted. *

* This instance is immutable and unaffected by this method call. * * @param year the new year value * @param monthOfYear the new monthOfYear value * @param dayOfMonth the new dayOfMonth value * @return a copy of this datetime with a different date * @throws IllegalArgumentException if any value if invalid */
